name: WhatsApp Restaurant Bot Pro - Twilio Version

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM user_sessions WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}' ORDER BY last_seen DESC LIMIT 1

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value:
=🍽️ Welcome to {{ $env.RESTAURANT_NAME || 'Our Restaurant' }}!

👋 Hi {{ $json.contact_name }}!

Please enter your table number (1-{{ $env.MAX_TABLES || '200' }})

Example: Table 5 or just 5

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO user_sessions (phone, table_number, cart, customer_name, last_seen, preferences, session_started)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.session.phone }}', 
  '{{ $json.session.table }}', 
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.session.cart).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 
  '{{ $json.session.customer_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 
  NOW(), 
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.session.preferences).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (phone) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  table_number = EXCLUDED.table_number,
  cart = EXCLUDED.cart,
  last_seen = EXCLUDED.last_seen,
  customer_name = EXCLUDED.customer_name
RETURNING *

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value:
=✅ Table {{ $json.session.table }} Confirmed!

📱 How to order:
• Type MENU to view menu
• Type POPULAR for top items
• Send item codes: B1 2 F3 1
• Type HELP for more commands

parameters.query:
SELECT code, name, category, price, description, allergens, is_available, image_url, popularity_score
FROM menu_items 
WHERE is_available = true 
ORDER BY category, code

SELECT code, name, category, price, description, popularity_score
FROM menu_items 
WHERE is_available = true 
ORDER BY popularity_score DESC 
LIMIT 10

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value:
=❓ *Help & Commands*
━━━━━━━━━━

📋 *Ordering:*
• Type MENU - View full menu
• Type POPULAR - Top items
• Send codes: B1 2 F3 1
  (2x item B1, 1x item F3)

🛒 *Cart:*
• Type CART - View cart
• Type REMOVE B1 - Remove item
• Type CLEAR - Clear cart
• Type CONFIRM - Place order

📊 *Account:*
• Type HISTORY - Past orders
• Type STATUS - Current order

💡 *Payment:*
• After confirming, scan UPI QR
• Type PAID after payment

📞 *Support:*
Call: {{ $env.SUPPORT_PHONE || '+91-1234567890' }}
Email: {{ $env.SUPPORT_EMAIL || 'support@restaurant.com' }}

parameters.query:
=SELECT code, name, price, category, is_available 
FROM menu_items 
WHERE code IN ({{ $json.parsed_items.map(i => "'" + i.code + "'").join(',') }}) 
AND is_available = true

=UPDATE user_sessions 
SET cart = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.session.cart).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 
    last_seen = NOW() 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}'
RETURNING *

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value:
=✅ *Added {{ $json.added_count }} items!*

{{ $json.added_items.map(i => i.qty + 'x ' + i.name).join('\n') }}

Type CART to view cart
Type CONFIRM to place order

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO orders (order_id, table_number, phone, customer_name, items, subtotal, tax, total, status, upi_string, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.order.order_id }}',
  '{{ $json.order.table }}',
  '{{ $json.from }}',
  '{{ $json.order.customer_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.order.items).replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.order.subtotal }},
  {{ $json.order.tax }},
  {{ $json.order.total }},
  'pending_payment',
  '{{ $json.upi_string.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *

parameters.name: Body
Body

parameters.query:
UPDATE user_sessions 
SET cart = '[]', 
    total_orders = total_orders + 1,
    last_seen = NOW() 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}'
RETURNING *

SELECT order_id, table_number, total, status, phone, customer_name
FROM orders 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}' 
AND status = 'pending_payment'
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 1

UPDATE orders 
SET status = 'paid',
    paid_at = NOW(),
    estimated_time = 20
WHERE order_id = '{{ $json.pending_order.order_id }}'
RETURNING *

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value:
=✅ *PAYMENT CONFIRMED!*

📋 Order: {{ $json.order_id }}
💰 Amount: ₹{{ parseFloat($json.total).toFixed(2) }}

👨‍🍳 Your order is being prepared!
⏱️ ETA: ~{{ $json.estimated_time }} minutes

📊 Type STATUS to track

Thank you! 🙏

parameters.name: Body

parameters.query:
UPDATE orders 
SET status = 'preparing'
WHERE order_id = '{{ $json.order_id }}'
RETURNING *

UPDATE user_sessions 
SET cart = '[]', 
    last_seen = NOW() 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}'
RETURNING *

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value:
=🗑️ Cart cleared!

Start fresh:
• Type MENU to browse
• Type POPULAR for top items

parameters.query:
SELECT order_id, table_number, total, status, created_at, estimated_time
FROM orders 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}' 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 1

SELECT order_id, table_number, total, status, created_at
FROM orders 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}' 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 5

=UPDATE user_sessions 
SET cart = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.session.cart).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 
    last_seen = NOW() 
WHERE phone = '{{ $json.from }}'
RETURNING *

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value:
=✅ Removed {{ $json.removed_item.name }} from cart!

Type CART to view updated cart
Type MENU to add more items
